project: AMG Aviation Group public website visual upgrade

assets.prompt_used: Premium private aviation hero still, executive hangar at dusk, business jet staged on ramp, soft reflection on polished concrete, understated navy and gold cinematic color grade, quiet luxury, operational support atmosphere, realistic aircraft proportions, no fake logos, no readable tail numbers, no text, wide 16:9 website hero composition with negative space for headline on the left.
assets.alt_text: Decorative background image. The visible hero text supplies the page context.
assets.desktop_usage: Full-bleed 16:9 hero poster and video fallback with headline space over the left side.
assets.mobile_usage: Full-bleed cropped hero background behind the same heading and calls to action.
assets.notes: Generated as PNG and converted to JPEG locally with sips. Visually reviewed for no readable tail numbers, no fake logos, no text, and realistic aircraft proportions.

assets.prompt_used: Cinematic private aviation website hero video, premium executive hangar at dusk, polished ramp reflecting soft navy and warm gold light, business jet staged beside hangar, subtle taxiway lights, calm luxury aviation operations atmosphere, slow realistic camera push-in, professional commercial aviation cinematography, quiet luxury, no people close-up, no logos, no readable tail numbers, no text, no distorted aircraft, no fantasy aircraft, 8 second seamless-feeling loop, 16:9.
assets.alt_text: Decorative silent hero video. The still poster remains available for reduced-motion users.
assets.desktop_usage: Autoplaying muted loop over the full hero background with the poster as fallback.
assets.mobile_usage: Autoplaying muted loop where supported; reduced-motion users receive the poster only.
assets.notes: Seedance 2.0 1080p and 720p attempts failed with minimum_pro_plan_required on the current starter plan. This fallback was generated from the poster start image at 720p and 5 seconds.

assets.prompt_used: Premium private aviation support image featuring a clean high-performance piston or turboprop aircraft on an executive ramp, realistic proportions, accurate propeller aircraft category, FBO environment, soft daylight, professional aviation photography, refined navy and warm neutral color grade, no readable tail number, no logos, no text, no distorted aircraft, website card composition, 4:3.

assets.mobile_usage: Full-width 4:3 category card image with overlay title.
assets.notes: Category reviewed as propeller/turboprop imagery, not a jet. No readable text, logo, or tail number observed.

assets.prompt_used: Premium aviation operations network map background of the United States, dark navy interface style, subtle airport nodes and route arcs, understated muted gold highlights, executive aviation support network, clean high-end SaaS aesthetic, no readable city labels, no fake data, no text, designed as background for live UI markers, 16:9.

assets.section: AMG Connect hero and portal preview
assets.prompt_used: Premium aviation operations software dashboard environment, abstract glass UI panels suggesting support requests, aircraft status, documents, quotes, invoices, and messages, private aviation operations center mood, navy white and muted gold, realistic SaaS product marketing visual, no readable fake text, no logos, no aircraft tail numbers, wide 16:9.
assets.alt_text: Abstract AMG Connect dashboard view with aviation support panels
assets.desktop_usage: Interior page hero image and subtle background layer behind the public portal preview mock.
assets.mobile_usage: Cropped hero background and decorative portal-preview texture.
assets.notes: Abstracted to avoid fake records or sensitive portal data. No backend, auth, or role logic changed.

assets.section: Request support hero and intake context
assets.prompt_used: Private aviation dispatch and route coordination visual, tablet and flight planning map on an executive desk, subtle route lines, aircraft status cards, premium FBO lighting, navy and warm gold tones, realistic Part 91 support coordination atmosphere, no readable text, no logos, no fake N-numbers, 16:9.
assets.alt_text: Aviation dispatch planning materials for support request review
assets.desktop_usage: Hero background, hero-side visual, and sticky form-context panel beside the existing support request form.
assets.mobile_usage: Cropped hero background with the context panel stacked above the form.
assets.notes: Reviewed for no readable fake text, no logos, and no tail numbers. The support request form fields and submission handler are unchanged.

assets.prompt_used: Realistic closed executive aircraft hangar doors at dusk, dark navy charcoal metal panels, subtle vertical seams, premium private aviation FBO atmosphere, muted gold edge light, soft ramp reflection, cinematic but restrained, no people, no aircraft logo, no readable text, no tail numbers, no signs, no fake words, centered composition for website entry overlay, high-end aviation brand, realistic materials, 16:9.
assets.alt_text: Decorative background for the AMG hangar entry overlay. The logo and visible heading provide the entry text.
assets.desktop_usage: Full-screen closed-hangar visual split into left and right door panels for click and wheel-progress opening.
assets.mobile_usage: Full-screen static door visual with simplified tap-to-enter animation and no scroll-jacking.
assets.notes: Generated as PNG and converted to JPEG locally. Used only as visual texture; React/CSS controls the door mechanics.
